seoTitle: Depot Hill vs Derrymore — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Depot Hill and Derrymore. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Depot Hill vs Derrymore: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Depot Hill and Derrymore.
heading: Depot Hill vs Derrymore — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Depot Hill, Queensland and Derrymore, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Derrymore has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Depot Hill (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Depot Hill or Derrymore safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Depot Hill has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Derrymore scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Depot Hill scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Derrymore scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Depot Hill or Derrymore?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Derrymore has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
